---
title: "Performance Benchmarks"
description: "panache performance metrics on real-world documents"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Last updated: 2026-03-01 21:14 UTC\
Commit: `c3a47b2`
:::

## Benchmark Suite

Benchmarks are run on real Quarto documents to measure realistic performance.

### Test Documents

- **Small**: Synthetic document (747 bytes) with mixed content
- **Medium**: Quarto tutorial from quarto-dev/quarto-web (\~9KB)
- **Tables**: Table-heavy document from Quarto docs (\~19KB)
- **Math**: Computation-heavy document with equations (\~29KB)
- **Large**: Comprehensive authoring guide (\~30KB)

### Methodology

- Each benchmark runs multiple iterations (1000 for small, 20-100 for larger)
- Measures three phases: full pipeline (parse+format), parse only, format only
- Reports average time per iteration and throughput (KB/s)

## Results

```
warning: function `init_logger` is never used
  --> src/lib.rs:27:4
   |
27 | fn init_logger() {
   |    ^^^^^^^^^^^
   |
   = note: `#[warn(dead_code)]` (part of `#[warn(unused)]`) on by default

warning: function `init_logger` is never used
  --> src/parser/core.rs:30:4
   |
30 | fn init_logger() {
   |    ^^^^^^^^^^^

warning: `panache` (lib) generated 2 warnings
    Finished `bench` profile [optimized] target(s) in 0.05s
     Running benches/formatting.rs (target/release/deps/formatting-a28c4abd661b6546)
Panache Benchmarks
==================


============================================================
Benchmark: Small (synthetic)
============================================================
Document size: 747 bytes, 47 lines

Full pipeline (parse + format):
  Total: 54.632375ms for 1000 iterations
  Average: 54.63µs per iteration (0.05ms)

Parse only:
  Total: 23.311061ms for 1000 iterations
  Average: 23.31µs per iteration (0.02ms)

Format only (CST pre-built):
  Total: 27.359959ms for 1000 iterations
  Average: 27.36µs per iteration (0.03ms)

Throughput: 13352.84 KB/s

============================================================
Benchmark: Medium (Quarto tutorial)
============================================================
Document size: 8893 bytes, 146 lines

Full pipeline (parse + format):
  Total: 45.821879ms for 100 iterations
  Average: 458.21µs per iteration (0.46ms)

Parse only:
  Total: 9.5417ms for 100 iterations
  Average: 95.41µs per iteration (0.10ms)

Format only (CST pre-built):
  Total: 32.366624ms for 100 iterations
  Average: 323.66µs per iteration (0.32ms)

Throughput: 18953.25 KB/s

============================================================
Benchmark: Tables (table-heavy)
============================================================
Document size: 18833 bytes, 636 lines

Full pipeline (parse + format):
  Total: 51.128424ms for 50 iterations
  Average: 1022.56µs per iteration (1.02ms)

Parse only:
  Total: 16.605064ms for 50 iterations
  Average: 332.10µs per iteration (0.33ms)

Format only (CST pre-built):
  Total: 30.002231ms for 50 iterations
  Average: 600.04µs per iteration (0.60ms)

Throughput: 17985.84 KB/s

============================================================
Benchmark: Math (computation-heavy)
============================================================
Document size: 28562 bytes, 664 lines

Full pipeline (parse + format):
  Total: 73.653438ms for 50 iterations
  Average: 1473.06µs per iteration (1.47ms)

Parse only:
  Total: 17.290033ms for 50 iterations
  Average: 345.80µs per iteration (0.35ms)

Format only (CST pre-built):
  Total: 50.777622ms for 50 iterations
  Average: 1015.54µs per iteration (1.02ms)

Throughput: 18935.13 KB/s

============================================================
Benchmark: Large (comprehensive)
============================================================
Document size: 29858 bytes, 592 lines

Full pipeline (parse + format):
  Total: 21.671041ms for 20 iterations
  Average: 1083.55µs per iteration (1.08ms)

Parse only:
  Total: 7.868618ms for 20 iterations
  Average: 393.40µs per iteration (0.39ms)

Format only (CST pre-built):
  Total: 12.18237ms for 20 iterations
  Average: 609.10µs per iteration (0.61ms)

Throughput: 26909.88 KB/s

============================================================
Benchmarks complete!
============================================================
```

## Interpretation

- **Full pipeline**: What users experience when running `panache format`
- **Parse only**: Time to build the CST (concrete syntax tree)
- **Format only**: Time to traverse CST and generate output
- **Throughput**: Processing speed in KB/second

## Reproducing

To reproduce these benchmarks:

```bash
# Download test documents
cd benches/documents && ./download.sh

# Run benchmarks
cargo bench --bench formatting
```
